title: Camp White Oak
summary: A remote woodland estate used as a strategic Black Tusk position and extraction site for President Ellis.

claims.text: Ubisoft describes Camp White Oak as an estate in the woodlands near a strategic Black Tusk position.
Black Tusk extracts President Ellis from Camp White Oak before Division Agents can reach him.

paragraphs.text: Camp White Oak combines a concealed woodland position with a failed Division pursuit: Black Tusk removes Ellis before Agents can capture him.

verification.notes: Later seasonal uses of this location must be versioned separately.
